title: Toasty Weapons
description: A Cool Mod From The Blink SMP That Was Made By Cordicus for julestoast. Weapon Models By n1tr0n__, other models and coded by Cordicus.
body:
Toasty Weapons Mod 

The Toasty Weapons Mod is a compact yet impactful addition to Minecraft, introducing new weapons, armor, and even a unique food item. Each feature is designed to enhance gameplay in creative and practical ways without overcomplicating the experience.

Features
1. Bloodrender (Hammer)
A heavy-duty weapon with a unique mechanic. On every fifth hit, it applies the Head Trauma effect, completely disabling the target's keyboard and mouse input for 5 seconds. This makes it a powerful choice for crowd control or PvP encounters.

2. Deathshard Blade (Sword)
A sleek and deadly weapon that applies the Amethyst Spike effect on hit. This effect deals damage over time, similar to poison, making it effective for sustained combat against tougher enemies.

3. Toast (Food)
A simple yet highly overpowered food item created by smelting bread. Toast provides exceptional benefits, making it an ideal choice for extended adventures or intense battles.

4. Ebonsteel Armor
Crafted from Netherite, this armor set doesn’t provide additional utility but stands out due to its unique and striking design. It’s an excellent choice for players who value aesthetics and want to look impressive during their adventures.

Credits

Coded by Cordicus – https://ko-fi.com/cordicus
Weapon Models by n1tr0n__ – https://ko-fi.com/n1tr0n

Conclusion
The Toasty Weapons Mod is a well-balanced addition for players looking to diversify their combat options and add a touch of creativity to their Minecraft world. With its unique mechanics and visually appealing additions, it’s a great fit for both casual and dedicated players.
